## Summary
- Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Docs Governance Gates (required)
- [ ] behavior/interface/ops changed?
- [ ] docs updated in the same PR?
- [ ] refined the existing canonical doc when authority did not move?
- [ ] if a new canonical doc was created, it was registered in `docs/README.md` and the losing authority was demoted?
- [ ] one canonical source of truth still owns each changed topic?
- [ ] version-sensitive docs updated with the current reviewed version/date?
- [ ] historical docs demoted or forward-linked if authority moved?

## Linked Docs
- Docs map entry:
- Canonical docs touched:
- Runbook / checklist:
- Status / audit doc:

## Policy Exceptions (if any)
- Exception:
- Owner:
- Expiration date:
- Follow-up TODO:
